name: EVkids Web Scraper Agent
description: Fetches opportunity listings from known public web sources (e.g. boston.gov, youthline), extracts plain text from the HTML, and feeds the result through the same Ingestion → Classifier → Personalizer pipeline as email newsletters. A lightweight supplement to the newsletter ingestion path when a partner doesn't send emails.

card_data.name: EVkids Web Scraper Agent
card_data.description: Fetches and strips HTML from a named source in SCRAPER_SOURCES, then feeds the plain text through the standard IngestionAgent pipeline (classify → deduplicate → personalise). Opportunity output enters the review queue for admin approval before reaching students.

skills.name: Scrape Web Source
skills.description: Fetches the HTML page for a named source key, strips tags to produce clean plain text, constructs a synthetic InboundMessage, and runs it through IngestionAgent.handle_inbound. Returns the count of new opportunities created. Raises ValueError for unknown source keys.

opportunities_created.description: Number of new opportunity records created (after dedup)

examples: Fetch new programs from youthline portal
